rulings.Case Title: ERNESTO MEDINA VS. ROBERT G. DOERING
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hrg On Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 9. PLAINTIFF ERNESTO MEDINA Notice Of Hearing On Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling is OFF CALENDAR, no proof of service on file. Additionally, no admissible evidence submitted in support of this application. Exhibits are attached to the Points and Authorities. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN MANN ET AL VS. AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 1. DEFENDANT AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC, MUATH ZGHOUL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED with respect to both the First cause of action for Malicious Prosecution, as well as the Second cause of action for Breach of Contract. Mr. Mann and Mr. Leis successfully demonstrate a probability that they will prevail on the Malicious Prosecution cause of action by providing evidence supporting each element of the offense. First, they show that the previous unlawful detainer resolved in their favor, which Ajloun Enterprises does not dispute. Second, they show that Ajloun Enterprises lacked probable cause to initiate the action by providing evidence that Ajloun Enterprises knew that it did not have business records of their rent history. Finally, they show that Ajloun Enterprises initiated the action with malice by demonstrating that the history between the parties was hostile and divisive. Ajloun Enterprises fails to show that the Breach of Contract cause of action is subject to the anti-SLAPP statute; Mr. Mann and Mr. Leis did not include the initiation of the previous unlawful detainer action as a basis for their Breach of Contract cause of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAPREIT, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. LYNDELL MIMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 10. DEFENDANT LYNDELL MIMS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship Hearing Required for Defendant to provide a code compliant proof of service for Motion for Relief From Forfeiture. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLE DREYFUSS VS. ERIN MUNDY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 3. DEFENDANT ERIN MUNDY MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED, this action is not based on "neglect, or failure to perform the conditions or covenants of the lease or agreement under which the property is held, or after default in the payment of rent." Additionally, the notice indicates the intention to terminate the sublease. See CCP 1174 and Neuhaus v. Norgard (1934) 140 Cal. App. 735. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TESFAI MEKONNEN VS. DEREK PECK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 4. DEFENDANT DEREK PECK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Continued to November 15, 2016 per CCP437c(h). The Court notes that this motion is based on the same grounds as previously denied motion. No objection raised by the opposing party. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN B. MILLER VS. KATHERINE HOFF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 5. DEFENDANT KATHERINE HOFF DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. the Notice is not defective on its face. The contract interpretation is not determinative at this point as no allegations exist in the complaint as to the specific dates the payments were made re: determination of habitual late payment, i.e. before or after the 8th of the month. Unauthorized sur-reply is stricken. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. VS. SHAWANA REED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 7. DEFENDANT SHAWANA REED Notice Of Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order is DENIED. No proof of service on file. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473.5. Defendant was served by a registered process server on October 8, 2016. Defendant prepared and served her answer by mail on October 17, 2016. (See Proposed answer and POS attached to the Motion). Default was entered on October 18, 2016. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SILVER PARK PROPERTY COMPANY, LLC VS. LUIS RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Verified Responses, Without Objection, To Pltf'S Req. For Production Of Documents Set One 2) Deem Admissions 3) Req. For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 08, 2016, Line 8. PLAINTIFF SILVER PARK PROPERTY COMPANY, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Responses, Without Objection, To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents Set One 2) Deem Admissions 3) Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED in part, subject to opposition. Ds to provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff to prepare order and present it for execution at the hearing. Defendants' counsel to appear for the hearing. Defendants' counsel to serve the order on his clients personally or by overnight mail no later than November 8, 2016. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,580 against Defendants only. Request for terminating sanctions is denied without prejudice. =(501/REQ)
